_comment: Derived from PACFlyer-OpeningAnnouncement-5-3.png (sampled 2026-04-28). These are the executed brand colors and type — they replace the abstract values in the brand-identity skill assets/palette.json with the actually-shipped flyer values.
name: PAC

navy.use: Page anchor, headlines on light fields, hero background, form block

cream.use: Default page ground; replaces white globally

navy_dark.use: Body text on cream when navy is too light

display.use: PAC headlines, FAITH FAMILY FELLOWSHIP & FUN, FOLLOW THE PAC, COUNT ME IN button — vintage chunky slab

subdisplay.use: Subhead lines like 'IS COMING SOON TO IMMACULATE CONCEPTION' — condensed bold sans

body.use: Body, form labels, reassurance line, footer — humanist sans

rules: Page background defaults to cream (#EFD7A4); white reads sterile and breaks the vintage feel.
Navy + burnt orange is the workhorse pairing.
Golden yellow is a spice — never carries body text.
No pastels. No Comic Sans / Curlz / Papyrus. No clip-art saints. No drop shadows or gradients.
Display type uses generous tracking and is encouraged in all caps.
